run_playwright_search: run a headless Chromium browser search on Bing or DuckDuckGo and return results with titles and URLs
create_playwright_search_tool: create a PlaywrightSearchTool instance registered in the tool registry for keyless web search
execute_playwright_search_tool: execute the PlaywrightSearchTool with a query string and optional num_results parameter to get markdown results
review_JS_BING_RESULTS: review the JavaScript selector string that extracts search result titles, URLs, and snippets from Bing pages
refactor_JS_DDG_RESULTS: refactor the JavaScript selector string that extracts search results from DuckDuckGo HTML fallback pages
